styleGroups.productBrief: 女装套装、短裙、衬衫、机能风或度假感穿搭，适合封面图和强记忆场景图
styleGroups.sceneBrief: 私人飞机、机场跑道、蓝天硬光、机翼和登机梯形成强透视背景，产品轮廓保持清晰
styleGroups.promptCore: High-impact aviation runway womenswear editorial, small aircraft or jet canopy as contextual prop, bright blue sky, clean hard daylight, confident vacation-luxury styling, readable full outfit and product silhouette.
promptVariants: model seated on the aircraft wing edge, one hand adjusting sunglasses, low-angle full-body shot with blue sky and runway lines
model standing beside an open aircraft canopy, one foot on the step, three-quarter body angle, crisp shirt and skirt details visible
model leaning lightly against the wing tip, legs angled, midday sunlight and clean tarmac background
model walking away from the aircraft stairs then turning back, wide environmental frame with aircraft nose and open sky
model sitting near the cockpit opening, relaxed arm on canopy frame, product front still clear and not hidden
styleGroups.negativePrompt: street wall standing pose, plain building facade, motionless front-facing catalog pose, copied aircraft markings, visible logo, watermark, text, unsafe runway action, distorted airplane, hidden garment

composition: aircraft forms diagonal leading lines
product remains central and unobstructed
leave sky negative space for cover crop
avoid tight face-only crop
avoid: standing on street against one wall
repeating the same cockpit seat pose across a suite

styleGroups.productBrief: 女装休闲套装、运动短裙、T 恤、夏季针织、轻户外穿搭
styleGroups.sceneBrief: 湖边草坪、高尔夫车、露台遮阳伞、宠物或自行车点缀，强调清爽度假和轻运动生活方式
styleGroups.promptCore: Lake resort and golf-leisure womenswear lifestyle, green lawn, golf cart, terrace seating or lakeside path, natural vacation daylight, relaxed sporty pose, clean readable garment shape.
promptVariants: model standing beside a golf cart with one hand on the cart roof, full outfit visible, lawn and trees behind
model seated on a striped outdoor lounge chair near the lake, knees angled, soft resort daylight, product front readable
model pushing or holding a bicycle on a lakeside path, pet optional, calm green background and clear full-body crop
model sitting at a terrace chair with shopping tote or drink as small prop, sporty casual outfit visible from head to toe
model crouching on a bright lawn, one hand holding cap brim, sunlit grass texture and open sky
model walking across a golf-course path with bag in hand, 3/4 side angle, relaxed holiday motion
styleGroups.negativePrompt: static street wall pose, cluttered cafe signage, heavy commercial text, overused plain gray facade, hidden waistline, overly busy props, copied pet or logo, watermark

camera: slightly high angle for seated lounge pose
composition: keep product front unobstructed
use green space as background block
small props should not compete with clothes
suite images alternate sitting and standing
avoid: consecutive use after another grass-lawn scene

styleGroups.productBrief: 连衣裙、半裙、针织开衫、森系或轻甜女装，适合模特图和氛围场景图
styleGroups.sceneBrief: 森林木栈道、湖边树荫、花丛草地、白色小屋，动作以走动、回头、蹲坐、坐花丛为主
styleGroups.promptCore: Romantic forest walkway and flower-field womenswear lifestyle, lush natural greenery, wooden path or wild flowers, gentle motion pose, soft feminine styling with clear clothing texture.
promptVariants: model walking on a wooden forest boardwalk, looking back over shoulder, dress moving naturally in dappled shade
model sitting at the edge of a flower bed, one hand touching flowers, low angle with greenery framing the outfit
model leaning near a lakeside tree trunk, one foot on wooden step, soft pink or light dress details visible
model half-reclining in a wildflower field, arms relaxed upward, top and skirt readable with flowers around but not covering product
model standing by a small countryside house and gravel path, 3/4 body turn, natural cottage background
model crouching among green plants, hand near hair, medium full-body crop and gentle natural smile
styleGroups.negativePrompt: urban wall standing pose, hard flash, plastic studio flowers, over-dense plants covering garment, copied face, watermark, text overlay, muddy green cast

composition: use plants as frame not obstruction
reserve garment readability in center
alternate walking, sitting and crouching in a suite
avoid: over-romantic blur that loses clothing detail

styleGroups.productBrief: 户外运动、机能背心、冲锋衣、短裤、瑜伽裤、徒步背包穿搭
styleGroups.sceneBrief: 高山湖泊、岩石、木栏杆、蓝天云层和背包道具，强调运动感和开阔环境
styleGroups.promptCore: Mountain lake hiking womenswear editorial, alpine water, rocky path, backpack or trail railing, clear sky and high-altitude sunlight, active pose with product fit and function visible.
promptVariants: model sitting on a mountain railing beside turquoise lake, boots visible, wide scenic frame and outfit front readable
model walking on a trail with backpack straps held by both hands, low-angle sky background and athletic garment lines
model seated on rocks near an alpine lake, one knee raised, backpack beside body without covering product
model standing on a ridge path, hand shielding sunlight, full-body crop with mountains and lake behind
model pausing mid-hike and turning toward camera, 3/4 body angle, wind movement in jacket or hair
styleGroups.negativePrompt: city wall pose, indoor hotel room, fake mountain backdrop, excessive blur, backpack covering the garment, copied landscape, watermark, text, unsafe cliff pose

composition: show environment scale but keep product central
use horizon away from face line
props support activity but do not block garment
avoid: consecutive grass resort scene if previous image is lawn

styleGroups.productBrief: 泳装、吊带、短上衣、度假裙、海边外套等夏季度假女装
styleGroups.sceneBrief: 海边、游艇、落日沙滩、海风和水面反光，动作强调坐、倚、迎风、回头
styleGroups.promptCore: Coastal yacht and sunset beach womenswear lifestyle, ocean horizon, boat deck or sandy shore, wind movement, sunlit skin and fabric texture, resort editorial with clear product read.
promptVariants: model leaning on yacht rail with blue ocean behind, wind in hair, medium full-body crop and top details sharp
model sitting on a boat stern facing the sea, side-back angle, garment silhouette readable against bright water
model standing on beach at sunset with jacket or cover-up lifted by wind, warm rim light and clear waistline
model walking along wet sand and turning toward camera, distant waves and orange sky, product front visible
model resting on coastal rocks at golden hour, one hand near hair, strong sky gradient but no text overlay
styleGroups.negativePrompt: street wall pose, indoor plain room, overexposed water, copied bikini pose, unsafe boat action, wet fabric hiding product, watermark, text, logo

composition: horizon kept level
product separated from bright water
wind movement adds variety
avoid repeated front standing
avoid: same beach background twice in a row

styleGroups.productBrief: 通勤裙装、皮衣、短外套、派对装、轻奢都市女装
styleGroups.sceneBrief: 桥下江景、城市街角、高空玻璃、夜景窗边和落日观景位，强调都市空间纵深和灯光变化
styleGroups.promptCore: Urban skyline and high-rise womenswear editorial, city bridge, glass observatory, night view window or sunlit street, polished confident styling, strong spatial depth with readable outfit.
promptVariants: model leaning on riverside railing under a bridge, skyline behind, wide cover crop and dress silhouette clean
model crouching beside a high-rise night window, city lights outside, leather boots and outfit texture visible
model standing by panoramic glass at sunset, one hand on rail, warm city haze and clear garment outline
model walking through a sunlit city street corner, lens flare controlled, 3/4 body turn with bag as small prop
model standing at a modern doorway in sunglasses, one hand adjusting coat, vertical architectural lines behind
model captured from a low angle against clean blue sky, dynamic fashion pose, long vertical silhouette and product lines readable
styleGroups.negativePrompt: blank wall-only background, no-action front pose, crowded traffic, readable store signs, logo, watermark, text overlay, dark clothing lost in night background

composition: use skyline depth instead of flat wall
separate dark garments from night view
show full outfit on main/model images

styleGroups.productBrief: 连衣裙、套装、精致针织、轻礼服和高级感女装
styleGroups.sceneBrief: 美术馆雕塑、长拱廊、欧式庭院和轻奢空间，画面克制、线条规整、产品质感清晰
styleGroups.promptCore: Quiet luxury gallery and arcade womenswear editorial, sculpture hall or vaulted corridor, elegant architectural symmetry, restrained pose, refined fabric texture and silhouette readability.
promptVariants: model standing beside a white gallery sculpture, soft museum daylight, full dress silhouette and clean negative space
model walking through a vaulted arcade corridor, centered perspective, one hand lightly touching railing, elegant 3/4 body angle
model seated on a low bench in a refined gallery room, knees angled, product drape and fabric texture clear
model pausing under an archway with long corridor depth, subtle hand near waist, calm editorial mood
model leaning by a stone balustrade in a museum courtyard, neutral palette and polished styling
styleGroups.negativePrompt: street wall standing pose, flashy nightclub luxury, copied artwork, visible museum labels, logos, text, watermark, excessive props, distorted architecture

composition: architecture creates depth
avoid copying exact art placement
product remains the subject over decor

styleGroups.productBrief: 皮衣、外套、针织、短裙、居家度假服和细节图，适合强调材质、搭配和生活方式
styleGroups.sceneBrief: 酒店房间、窗边、床沿、干净墙面和室内暖光，重点让商品材质可读，动作从躺、坐、整理衣服到镜前站立变化
styleGroups.promptCore: Hotel room and window-light womenswear lifestyle, clean interior or simple wall used for product readability, natural window light or warm room light, relaxed seated or dressing pose, fabric and fit remain clear.
promptVariants: model sitting on a hotel bed edge, one hand adjusting jacket sleeve, warm room light and boots visible
model reclining lightly on a tatami or carpeted floor, top and shorts readable, minimal props around body
model standing near a mirror or room window in swimwear or lounge outfit, sunset room light and clean full-body crop
close medium shot by a bright window, model holding coat collar, fabric texture and collar detail emphasized
model standing against a clean exterior wall for a detail-readable outfit shot, hand at waist, no street clutter
model seated on bed with bag beside body, legs angled, leather or denim texture sharp and unobstructed
styleGroups.negativePrompt: repeating plain wall as the whole suite, front-facing no-action stance, messy hotel room, text, watermark, logo, product hidden by bag or blanket, low-resolution mirror selfie look

composition: best for detail and model images
use simple backgrounds only after stronger scene images
props must not cover product

backgroundRotation: 同一套图内不可连续使用同一背景大类；飞机、草地湖畔、森林花丛、山野湖泊、海边、城市高空、艺廊、酒店室内至少轮换 4 类。
场景图和封面图优先使用高差异场景：飞机、山野湖泊、海边游艇、城市高空。
如果上一张使用草地或森林，下一张应切换到海边、城市、室内或飞机，避免连续绿色背景。
imageRoleRules: 主图保持产品正面清晰，可使用轻动作和干净背景，不追求夸张场景。
封面图负责记忆点，优先选择飞机、海岸、山野、城市高空等强环境。
场景图负责背景差异和生活方式，使用坐、倚、走、回头、扶栏、调整衣服、背包行走、蹲坐等动作。
模特图重点变化姿势和角度，不连续生成正面站立。
细节图优先使用酒店窗光、干净墙面或室内近景，保证材质、版型、领口、袖口、腰线可读。
globalAvoid: 整套图都站在街边或墙前
复制人脸、品牌、文字、水印、飞机编号、艺术品细节
为了场景牺牲商品清晰度
